message:
fix(gen_server): mask depth hard assert, info rejection tracing, spawn timestamp

- Upgrade AsyncMaskGuard::enter mask depth check from debug_assert to assert
  with expanded message explaining INV-MASK-BOUNDED violation. Same rationale
  as the parallel change in cx.rs: exceeding MAX_MASK_DEPTH silently prevents
  cancellation observation, which is a hard invariant violation in any build

- Add cx.trace("gen_server::info_rejected_stopped") calls in both
  GenServerHandle::info and GenServerRef::info when the server is in
  Stopping/Stopped state. Without this trace, info rejection was invisible in
  lab replays, making it difficult to diagnose "message lost" scenarios

- Use state.now instead of Time::ZERO when spawning named gen_server via
  SpawnableGenServer. Time::ZERO caused the initial lease timestamp to appear
  as if the server was spawned at epoch start, which could trigger false
  positives in stale-lease detection

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
